title: Shadows n' Light! Shadow Mons! Resources
description: An Mod That Adds Required Resources For [Shadows n' Light! Shadow Mons!]
body:
# ⚠ This is the REQUIRED MOD for the Datapack Shadows n' Light! Shadow Mons! Please Download this along with the Datapack and Resource Pack ⚠ https://modrinth.com/datapack/shadowmons-cobblemon


***Prepare to embark on a dark and mysterious journey as you are able to experience ShadowMons! This variant of Pokémon brings a new level of power to your Cobblemon adventures!***

In the darkness, when the moon glows, you are able to evolve **Mewtwo, Mew, Articuno, Zapdos, Moltres, and Xerneas** into their **Shadow Forms**! With `"The Gem Of Shadows"`, you can transform these Legendaries into **Shadow Pokémon!** Along with this evolution, they each learn a **unique move** and gain the secondary **Dark** typing! This version of Pokémon reduces **HP, Defense, and Sp. Defense stats** `(-20%)`, in return of higher **Speed, Attack, and Sp. Attack stats** `(+20%)`, along with having the ability **Dark Aura** and a new **Hidden Ability**! **Shadow Pokémon's** move set also overpowers their **base Legendary's** move set by about **3x**, having a more diverse amount of moves to use! The shiny variant of **Shadow Pokemon** is also available! 

However, the darkest nights have to convert into the dawning light. When the sun's radiance fills the sky, you have the chance to restore **Shadow Pokémon** to its original form. By using `"The Gem Of Purification"`, you can revert **Shadow Pokémon** back into their **base Legendary** form! That's not all! Once you purify **Shadow Pokemon**, they keep their **Shadow form's** move sets and move pools! 

How do you craft these gems, you may ask? Well, by **smelting** `"The Stone Of Dark Nights"` and `"The Stone Of First Light"` you are able to obtain a certain **shard**. Once you collect ***9*** of these **shards** and combine them in a **Crafting Table**, then you will obtain the **gems** needed! 

Your **Cobblemon** adventure is about to reach new heights as you dive into the shadows and uncover the true power of **ShadowMons**!

***P.S: Check out Cobblemon's Discord! I will be posting new features that are going to be added in later updates!***

# ⚠ This is the REQUIRED MOD for the Datapack Shadows n' Light! Shadow Mons! Please Download this along with the Datapack and Resource Pack ⚠ https://modrinth.com/datapack/shadowmons-cobblemon
